description: A customer from a non-profit organization is making a purchase and has a tax-exempt certificate.

nodes.task_description: Scan all items for the purchase.

expected_outcome.expected: All items are correctly added to the transaction.

nodes.task_description: Verify the customer's tax-exempt certificate and enter the tax-exempt ID into the POS.

expected_outcome.expected: The associate validates the customer's status.

nodes.task_description: The POS system removes the sales tax from the total. Complete the transaction.

expected_outcome.expected: The sale is completed correctly without sales tax.
